ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of wine (e.g., red, white, sparkling) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the wine is produced */,
  "producer" TEXT /* Producer of the wine */,
  "inventory_level" INTEGER /* Current inventory level */,
  "alcohol_content" REAL /* Alcohol content of the wine */,
  "vintage_year" INTEGER /* Vintage year of the wine */,
  "bottle_size" TEXT /* Size of the bottle */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "available_for_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is available for purchase */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "serving_temperature" TEXT /* Recommended serving temperature for the wine type */,
  "pairing_suggestions" TEXT /* Food pairing suggestions for the wine type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate of the region */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Soil type of the region */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the region's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "producer_name" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the producer */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the producer was founded */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the producer's logo or image */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the producer's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., unpaid, paid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product in the order */,
  "subtotal" REAL /* Subtotal of the item in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "is_subscribed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is subscribed to the newsletter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for automatic reordering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Name of the shipping carrier */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_program" (
  "loyalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of loyalty points */,
  "last_earned_date" TEXT /* Date the points were last earned */,
  "points_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the points will expire */,
  "tier" TEXT /* Loyalty tier of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_program_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the recommendation (e.g., active, dismissed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the product (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the review was created */,
  "is_verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review was marked as helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, refunded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
